LCO: 73.6% at 5.2 V; standard 4.2 V widely demonstrated. LiNiO2: DFT unfavorable (>100 meV/atom). Tier 1 (catholyte): sigma 1-4 mS/cm; oxidative 4.21-4.22 V; LCO confirmed; LPSC anode interlayer strategy.
